name: @parcha/recap
description: Evidence-backed coding-agent session recaps for Claude Code, Codex, and pi

scripts.test: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v && python3 -m py_compile skills/recap/scripts/recap.py skills/recap/scripts/accounting.py skills/recap/scripts/event_ledger.py skills/recap/scripts/git_provenance.py && python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/plugin.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .codex-plugin/plugin.json >/dev/null

author: Miguel Rios
